parsed_review.summary:
Independent read-only review of CP00-687 (RP22 External Integrations I, P07 synthetic fixture/test/evidence/review/closeout tail + P08 evidence-contract foundation bridge; risk C; 150 units; RP22.P07.M06.S03-RP22.P08.M02.S14) via Read/Grep/Glob only.

VERIFIED: (1) Scope/identity consistent across prompt, manifest, both contracts, registry, and validator. (2) Deliverable/phase/micro distributions are internally consistent (sum to 150) and identical across manifest delivery_counts, contract requirements, and registry EXTERNAL_INTEGRATIONS_I_CP687_REQUIREMENTS; failure_recovery=58 and hermes_evidence=38 spot-counted in the manifest unit list (2 unit arrays, each consistent); enforced by validateExternalIntegrationsICp687Coverage and asserted in model.test.js against the live plan pack. (3) Implementation present/complete in service.js (descriptor, case-set, Hermes packet, Claude packet, closeout handoff) — all Object.freeze, descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, raw_payload_included=false; resolved through index.js wildcard re-exports; no skip/TODO/placeholder markers. (4) validators.js enforces descriptor-only flags, all runtime_opened=false, no real/golden payloads, no cross-tenant, and authority_boundary.claude_is_final_approval=false. (5) Both contract files regenerated and validated against the deterministic projection. (6) Comprehensive no-write/no-real-data attestation; freeze wrappers stamp synthetic_only/no_real_data/writes_product_state=false and all provider/credential/permission/audit/persistence/command flags false. (7) Claude boundary: read_only=true, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false. (8) Hermes boundary: control-plane evidence/receipt only — hermes_runtime_opened=false, runtime_receipt_emitted=false, not embedded in product runtime. (9) Pre-review state correct: production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, status in_progress/pending_review; no premature raw-output.json or review-receipt.json; valid_review_receipts=[] and invalid_review_attempts=[] (no laundered invalid evidence). (10) Review hardening: auth preflight returned valid success JSON (exit 0, non-empty stdout); tools restricted to Read/Grep/Glob; forbidden_tools_present=false; forbidden_review_evidence taxonomy present (not_logged_in, malformed_json, quota_failure, permission_denied, tool_call_only_output, non_read_only_review). (11) No over-claim of runtime/enterprise-trust anywhere. (12) Pack ordering consistent: upstream CP00-686 (just closed per git log), next CP00-688, live_latest_pack_id=CP00-687.

PROVENANCE CAVEAT: command-evidence.json reports 22/22 validation commands passing (exit 0). As a read-only reviewer I did not and cannot re-execute them; I independently corroborated via source inspection the structural consistency those commands assert (coverage/descriptor validators, contract-projection equality, export resolution). This is reported-but-not-re-executed evidence.

OUT-OF-SCOPE NOTE: docs/ldip-integration/claude-review-results/c-ldip-01-invalid-attempt-01.json is an untracked file from a different program (LDIP), correctly listed as an unrelated dirty file in changed-file-scope.json; it is not CP00-687 review evidence and was not treated as such.

The descriptor-verified production_ready claim (descriptor-only, runtime-closed; not an enterprise-trust/runtime claim) is supported by implementation, tests, validation, inspection, and the no-write/no-real-data boundaries. blocks_goal_closeout=false because the pack makes no runtime or enterprise-trust claim and the human/final-approval authority boundary is outside this receipt. Verdict: PASS with zero findings.
